; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-05-06T23:17:34Z


AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]

    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]] > [[6502786168]]#[[15549782143769420265]] > [[233704648923420]]#[[233745975898428]]
        REPLACE [[7173043979669814807]] WITH {
            ~&7173043979669814807&~: ~&6504329801&~
        }
    END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]
        REBUILD [[6305947476639122449]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&233724020023100&~.~&6504419009&~(~&"9069811903160607942&~); }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&7083121450889&~; }
            REMOVE LOCATED
        END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE

END AFFECT
